title: Integrated structural risk candidates without future prediction
purpose: Integrate RF-6-derived gradient/circulation energy ranges, RF-7 shape/channel/boundary dynamics, and RF-8 same-axis feedback, innovation, ambiguity, and unresolved residual into conservative structural risk candidates while preserving supporting evidence, counterevidence, and uncertainty and without producing a scalar risk score or future prediction.

required: canonical trajectory prefix only for parent artifact validation

alignment.risk_row_definition: RF8 lag i compares transition i and i+1 and is aligned to RF7 and RF8 evidence at target transition i+1
alignment.transition_time_source: RF7 transition_shape_metrics transition_times at target transition

risk_structure.same_axis_amplification_signal: any RF8 same-direction amplification axis at the aligned lag
risk_structure.same_axis_attenuation_or_cessation_signa: any RF8 same-direction attenuation or axis cessation at the aligned lag
risk_structure.boundary_recovery_weakening_signal: RF7 boundary sticking OR persistent boundary mass with declining mass-weighted inward flow
risk_structure.boundary_recovery_strengthening_countere: inward-flow increase OR channel widening OR direction reversal OR expansion OR dispersion
risk_structure.observed_return_suppression_candidate: boundary recovery weakening AND no recovery-strengthening counterevidence
risk_structure.overconvergence_candidate: shape convergence AND flow-channel narrowing AND same-axis amplification
risk_structure.divergence_candidate: shape divergence AND flow-channel widening AND same-axis attenuation or cessation
risk_structure.recovery_margin_reduction_candidate: boundary recovery weakening AND no recovery-strengthening counterevidence
risk_structure.new_drive_coincident_candidate: history-conditioned new drive at the same target transition AND at least one structural candidate
risk_structure.gradient_dominance_consensus: RF7 RF6-derived gradient-energy minimum exceeds circulation-energy maximum
risk_structure.circulation_dominance_consensus: RF7 RF6-derived circulation-energy minimum exceeds gradient-energy maximum

unresolved_residual.dominance_rule: RF8 residual_l1 minimum exceeds absolute floor and is at least the configured fraction of observed change for every saved optimal candidate

prohibitions: modify_or_copy canonical G_t K_t or parent artifacts
